profiles.name: organization-governance
profiles.label: Organization Governance
profiles.short_description: Organization policy, automation, security and shared GitHub standards.
starter_items: Review organization policy baseline
Validate automation and security controls
Track adoption across repositories

profiles.name: website-communications
profiles.label: Website & Communications
profiles.short_description: Website delivery, institutional communication, SEO and platform operations.
starter_items: Plan the next editorial and SEO release
Validate website changes and accessibility
Publish, monitor and report outcomes

profiles.name: onboarding-recruitment
profiles.label: Onboarding & Recruitment
profiles.short_description: Candidate review, contributor onboarding, mentorship and access progression.
starter_items: Review the active onboarding or recruitment queue
Complete mentoring and validation checkpoints
Record the final decision and next access level

profiles.name: administration
profiles.label: Administration & Operations
profiles.short_description: Administrative tooling, governance operations, permissions and auditability.
starter_items: Review the administrative operations backlog
Validate permissions, secrets and audit controls
Ship and document the next operational improvement

profiles.name: repository-template
profiles.label: Repository Template
profiles.short_description: Reusable repository standards, automation and generated-project quality.
starter_items: Review template standards and required files
Generate and validate a test repository
Publish the next template revision

profiles.name: research-reproducibility
profiles.label: Research & Reproducibility
profiles.short_description: Scientific modelling, experiments, independent review and publication readiness.
starter_items: Define the research question, assumptions and acceptance criteria
Implement experiments, tests and reproducible environments
Complete independent review and publication packaging

profiles.name: python-package
profiles.label: Python Package Delivery
profiles.short_description: Package engineering, testing, documentation, release and maintenance.
starter_items: Plan the next package milestone and compatibility target
Implement changes with tests and reproducibility checks
Validate documentation and prepare the release

default_profile.name: general
default_profile.label: Repository Delivery
default_profile.short_description: Planning, execution, review and delivery for this repository.
starter_items: Define the current repository objective
Prioritize the next delivery milestone
Validate completion criteria and documentation
